faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Fresh Meadows homes?
faqs.answer: Fresh Meadows residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, flour beetles, grain weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, rice, pasta, nuts, dried fruits, and pet food. They often arrive in already-contaminated products from stores or spread from neighboring units in multi-family buildings.

faqs.question: How much does pantry pest control cost in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Pantry pest control services in Fresh Meadows typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your kitchen and storage areas, and the number of treatments required. This includes inspection, treatment, contaminated product identification, and follow-up services to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a pantry pest problem in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Fresh Meadows residents dealing with pantry pest infestations. faqs.question: Are pantry pest treatments safe around food and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only food-safe, EPA-approved products specifically designed for use in kitchens and pantries. Our treatments target pantry pests while remaining safe for your family and pets. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed and ensure all products used meet the highest safety standards for residential food storage areas.
